name: Grecian Style Shrimp Scampi
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs Jumbo Shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. To make scampi sauce: In a saucepan over low flame, melt butter and add oil. Stir in salt, pepper, rosemary, oregano, paprika, bay leaves, and garlic. Add sherry and stir until combined.
3. Place cleaned shrimp in a large baking dish. Cover the shrimp with feta cheese and top with bread crumbs. Pour scampi sauce over the shrimp.
4. Bake for approximately 25 minutes or until the shrimp are tender. Serve over rice or angel hair pasta.
